scripts.test: bun run test:battle-engine && bun run test:mcp-server
scripts.test:turn: bun run --cwd packages/battle-engine bun test src/modules/turn/accuracy.test.ts src/modules/turn/critical-hit.test.ts src/modules/turn/paralysis.test.ts src/modules/turn/test/moves/stun-spore.test.ts src/modules/turn/test/moves/body-slam.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/game-engine typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/battle-engine typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/mcp-server typecheck
